code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut total = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut have = false
  mut i = 0
  mut stop = false
  while i < n and not stop
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      have = true
    else
      if have
        if total + cur > 100
          stop = true
        else
          total = total + cur
          cur = 0
          have = false
        end
      end
    end
    if not stop
      i = i + 1
    end
  end
  if have and not stop
    if total + cur <= 100
      total = total + cur
    end
  end
  println("total=#{total}")
end
